'''Ref Mawber''' was an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]]. Mawber was the head of a network of [[Spy/Legends|spies]] which were working undercover in the different criminal syndicates on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Questal/Legends|Questal]]. He answered personally to the [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] assigned to Questal, [[Bandor (Moff)|Bandor]]. Mawber ignored that the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] had its own agent watching Bandor's activities, [[Lanni Peggann]], who was Mawber's equivalent in the other side. It was known that Mawber was friends with another ISB agent, [[Mar Barezz]], and that Mawber assisted him during Barezz's obsessive hunt for Rebel agent [[Tay Vanis|Tiree]].
